name: subscription-triad
description: Plan with Codex, review with Fable, execute with Grok Build, and stay on subscription CLIs.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, review, and build through subscription CLIs
interface.longDescription: A fail-closed Codex workflow that binds Fable approval to an exact plan hash, dispatches Grok Build through OAuth, and requires Codex verification.
defaultPrompt: Use $subscription-triad to implement this feature through the full gated workflow.
Use $subscription-triad to check provider readiness without executing anything.
Use $subscription-triad to resume the approved Grok execution and verify the result.
